raw_cv_text:
Buzz Ward
com
Education
Imperial College London, MEng Computing - First 2022 – 2026
Relevant modules: Introduction to Machine Learning, Computer Vision
King Edward VI Camp Hill School for Boys sixth form – A*A*A*A*A* 2020 – 2022
A Levels: Mathematics, Further Mathematics, Computing, Physics, Arabic
Experience
Arm | Machine Learning Intern April - September 2025
- Worked on optimising machine learning libraries such as Pytorch for Arm CPUs, using C++, Python and AArch64
assembly
- Contributed upstream patches to multiple open-source projects, resulting in up to 2× performance gains in PyTorch
workloads
- Collaborated with engineers across Arm and external organizations to support open-source development and
integration
Gemba Advantage | Software Engineer Intern June - August 2024
- Designed and built an internal proof-of-concept application using React, TypeScript, Java (Spring Boot), and
OpenSearch
- Reduced deployment time by 90% and improved environment consistency by containerising the application using
Docker
- Presented final project to an audience of over 70 people, including senior developers and executives
Government and industry funded placement | Cybersecurity Intern July - August 2023
- Covered all areas of cybersecurity, including networking, cloud, infosec and digital forensics
- Participated in Microsoft KC7 Cyber Challenge, IoT and HackTheBox hackathons providing practical experience in
red/blue team exercises
Skills
Languages: Java, C/C++, Python, Scala, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, x86-64/Aarch64 assembly, Dart (Flutter)
Tools and frameworks: Git, Docker, AWS (Certified Cloud Practitioner), Firebase, Spring Boot, Flask, React, OpenSearch
Projects
FullPlate mobile application | Dart, Flutter, Firebase, GitHub Actions May - June 2024
- Created a mobile application to redistribute excess supermarket produce to charities, reducing waste and
benefitting local communities
- Used Git for version control, and CI/CD pipelines to automate testing, building and creating an app executable
- Features include real-time database listeners, Google Maps integration, user authentication, and responsive user
interfaces
WACC compiler | Scala, Gitlab CI/CD, TDD, x86-64 assembly January - April 2024
- Led a team of 4 in developing a full compiler for the statically typed WACC language
- Implemented a lexer, parser, semantic analyser and code generator to produce an x86-64 assembly output
- Extended functionality with global monomorphic type inference, eliminating the need for explicit type declaration for
easier development
Face recognition registration | Python, Flask, MySQL, OpenCV, JavaScript, HTML October - February 2022
- Worked with a client to design and implement a face recognition system to register students at a school
- Used accessible design principles to design interfaces for students and teachers
- Reduced time to register entire class by 75% over traditional methods
Achievements and Extra-curriculars
- Raised over £1000 for charity through a sponsored cycle from London to Paris, covering over 300 km August 2025
- Won 1st place in an inter-university hackathon by building a low-cost hardware and software solution to facilitate long
distance communication in rural areas June 2024
- Volunteer at Children of Adam soup kitchen for over 3 years 2022 - Present
